## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Jimmy's transition plan and equity compensation at GrowthX Labs.](https://fathom.video/share/9Mpw8HKsBfQwrQqFu4CeKJzzyRDEjVrV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel proposed 3% equity for Jimmy, citing it as higher than typical executive compensation](https://fathom.video/share/9Mpw8HKsBfQwrQqFu4CeKJzzyRDEjVrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [Jimmy expected a higher equity percentage; both agreed to continue discussions](https://fathom.video/share/9Mpw8HKsBfQwrQqFu4CeKJzzyRDEjVrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [Focus on building leverage through software/platform to increase company valuation](https://fathom.video/share/9Mpw8HKsBfQwrQqFu4CeKJzzyRDEjVrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
  - [Aim to grow from \~$3M to $36M ARR in next few years, potentially reaching $100M+ valuation](https://fathom.video/share/9Mpw8HKsBfQwrQqFu4CeKJzzyRDEjVrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)

## Topics

### Current Business Status and Growth Plans

  - [Currently at \~$2-3M ARR, aiming for $12M next year and $36M the following year](https://fathom.video/share/9Mpw8HKsBfQwrQqFu4CeKJzzyRDEjVrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [Projecting potential $100M+ valuation at $36M ARR (10x multiple)](https://fathom.video/share/9Mpw8HKsBfQwrQqFu4CeKJzzyRDEjVrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
  - [Shifting focus from smaller clients to larger, more profitable accounts (e.g., DataGrid at $132K for 3 months)](https://fathom.video/share/9Mpw8HKsBfQwrQqFu4CeKJzzyRDEjVrV?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Planning to announce the company officially soon](https://fathom.video/share/9Mpw8HKsBfQwrQqFu4CeKJzzyRDEjVrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Equity and Compensation Discussion

  - [Marcel proposed 3% equity for Jimmy, higher than typical executive compensation](https://fathom.video/share/9Mpw8HKsBfQwrQqFu4CeKJzzyRDEjVrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [Jimmy expected a higher percentage, citing his contributions from $300K to $2M ARR](https://fathom.video/share/9Mpw8HKsBfQwrQqFu4CeKJzzyRDEjVrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
  - [Discussed potential for profit-sharing and milestone-based equity increases](https://fathom.video/share/9Mpw8HKsBfQwrQqFu4CeKJzzyRDEjVrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [Emphasized the importance of building towards a big exit in 4-5 years](https://fathom.video/share/9Mpw8HKsBfQwrQqFu4CeKJzzyRDEjVrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)

### Strategic Shift in Service Offerings

  - [Moving from 3-month contracts to 12-month engagements for better client alignment](https://fathom.video/share/9Mpw8HKsBfQwrQqFu4CeKJzzyRDEjVrV?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Developing a more comprehensive growth strategy beyond just SEO:](https://fathom.video/share/9Mpw8HKsBfQwrQqFu4CeKJzzyRDEjVrV?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
    1.  Content creation
    2.  Distribution (social, newsletter, lead magnets)
    3.  Conversion optimization
  - [Aim to create interconnected work streams that build a growth flywheel for clients](https://fathom.video/share/9Mpw8HKsBfQwrQqFu4CeKJzzyRDEjVrV?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)

### Operational Challenges and Investments

  - [High expenses including $67K monthly credit card bill and significant payroll costs](https://fathom.video/share/9Mpw8HKsBfQwrQqFu4CeKJzzyRDEjVrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [Investing in high-leverage resources like engineers, despite short-term profit impact](https://fathom.video/share/9Mpw8HKsBfQwrQqFu4CeKJzzyRDEjVrV?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [Shifting Jimmy's focus to higher-value clients and strategic initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/9Mpw8HKsBfQwrQqFu4CeKJzzyRDEjVrV?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jimmy to research and reflect on equity expectations and overall compensation package](https://fathom.video/share/9Mpw8HKsBfQwrQqFu4CeKJzzyRDEjVrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [Continue discussions on equity and long-term value creation in the coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/9Mpw8HKsBfQwrQqFu4CeKJzzyRDEjVrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [Finalize transition plan and prepare for company announcement](https://fathom.video/share/9Mpw8HKsBfQwrQqFu4CeKJzzyRDEjVrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Focus on developing new work streams and scaling from $2M to $10M+ ARR](https://fathom.video/share/9Mpw8HKsBfQwrQqFu4CeKJzzyRDEjVrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [Build out the software/platform side to increase company valuation and exit potential](https://fathom.video/share/9Mpw8HKsBfQwrQqFu4CeKJzzyRDEjVrV?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
